route_reasons: AccessKey related event → credential misuse risk.
High severity (9.0) but no L3 triggers → prefer L2.

debug_info.query_text_used: event summary: Discovery:IAMUser/AnomalousBehavior The user GeneratedFindingUserType : GeneratedFindingUserName is anomalously invoking APIs commonly used in Discovery tactics. APIs commonly used in Discovery tactics were invoked by user GeneratedFindingUserType : GeneratedFindingUserName under unusual circumstances. Such activity is not typically seen from this user.
